testcase.name: metadata_matches_radab

error.message: Error in `yaml.load(readLines(con, warn = readLines.warn), error.label = error.label, ('test-metadata.R:25:3')

testcase.name: r_data_functions_work

error.message: Error in `yaml.load(readLines(con, warn = readLines.warn), error.label = error.label, ('test-rdata.R:12:3')

testcase.error: Error in `yaml.load(readLines(con, warn = readLines.warn), error.label = error.label, ...)`: (/__w/random.cdisc.data/random.cdisc.data/random.cdisc.data.Rcheck/random.cdisc.data/metadata/ADPC.yml) Scanner error: mapping values are not allowed in this context at line 17, column 9 Backtrace: x 1. +-testthat::expect_silent(adpc <- radpc(adsl, seed = 1)) at test-rdata.R:12:2 2. | \-testthat:::quasi_capture(enquo(object), NULL, evaluate_promise) 3. | +-testthat (local) .capture(...) 4. | | +-withr::with_output_sink(...) 5. | | | \-base::force(code) 6. | | +-base::withCallingHandlers(...) 7. | | \-base::withVisible(code) 8. | \-rlang::eval_bare(quo_get_expr(.quo), quo_get_env(.quo)) 9. \-random.cdisc.data::radpc(adsl, seed = 1) 10. \-random.cdisc.data:::apply_metadata(adpc, "metadata/ADPC.yml") 11. \-yaml::yaml.load_file(system.file(filename, package = "random.cdisc.data")) 12. \-yaml::yaml.load(...)
